stimulus.content: On Election Day, Mr. and Mrs. Lee go to their polling place. They each fill out a ballot to choose the next President of the United States.

stem: What is the main way Mr. and Mrs. Lee are taking part in their government?

choices.text: By casting votes in an election
By serving on a local jury

answer_explanation: Voting is one of the most important ways citizens take part in government. By casting ballots on Election Day, Mr. and Mrs. Lee help choose their leaders. Paying taxes, serving on juries, and writing laws are different civic activities.
